Container.Name: owlet-capture
Container.Overview:
ONE-TIME capture appliance for the native (TUTK/Kalay) Owlet bridge. Bundles mitmproxy (web UI) + adb + frida-tools + the capture scripts. Run it once to extract the 3 Owlet-specific values (cloud UID/AuthKey, AV credentials, stream-start IOCTL), then you can stop/remove it.
USAGE: deploy on the owlet-net network alongside owlet-redroid. Open the web UI at http://[IP]:8081 (default password: owlet). Then open this container's Console (the >_ icon) and follow the printed steps: setup-redroid-mitm.sh, then run-frida.sh unpin (log in), then run-frida.sh ioctl (live view). Captures are written to the mapped /captures folder.
Set MITM_IP to your Unraid server IP so redroid can reach the proxy.

Config.Name: Captures
Config.Description: Where extracted credential candidates + full flows are written.

Config.Name: mitm CA store
Config.Description: Persists the mitmproxy CA between runs.

Config.Name: MITM_IP
Config.Description: Your Unraid server IP — redroid's Android proxy points here.
